prd.oneLiner: A location-based secondhand marketplace for buying and selling with neighbors you can meet on foot
prd.goal: Reach 300K monthly active users and 40% weekly retention within 12 months of launch
prd.whyNow: Inflation has made secondhand a daily habit, and fatigue with shipping fraud is driving fast-growing demand for nearby, meet-in-person deals
prd.problem: Shipping-based resale is prone to fraud and return disputes, and sellers find packing and mailing a chore. People want to meet neighbors, inspect the item, and deal in person, but there is no good channel for it
prd.solution: Verify the user's neighborhood by GPS and show only listings within the same living area. Arrange meetups over in-app chat, deal face to face, and build trust with a manner score
prd.alternatives: Nationwide resale platforms (shipping-centric), local community forums and open chats (unmoderated), offline flea markets (time and place constrained)
prd.differentiator: Neighborhood verification keeps only real neighbors, and a cumulative manner-score reputation eases the anxiety of anonymous deals

targets.name: Budget-minded Jiyoung
targets.needs: wants to buy household goods cheaply, quickly, and from someone trustworthy
targets.pain: can't trust an item's condition in shipping deals, and delivery takes too long

targets.name: Declutterer Hyunwoo
targets.needs: wants to offload unused items in the neighborhood without hassle
targets.pain: packing and shipping is tedious, and dealing with strangers feels unsafe

scenarios.text: Jiyoung verifies her new neighborhood, spots a nearby desk in the home feed, and arranges a meetup with the seller over chat
Hyunwoo lists an unused stroller with 5 photos, marks the chatting buyer as reserved, and completes the deal in person

kpis.name: Deal completion rate
kpis.method: share of started chats that reach 'sold'

kpis.name: Neighborhood verification rate
kpis.method: share of signups that complete location verification

kpis.name: Retention (WAU/MAU)
kpis.method: share of monthly actives returning weekly

inScope: GPS-based neighborhood verification and living-area listing exposure
Listing creation with photos, price, and category
Reputation via manner score and post-deal reviews
nonGoals: Shipping and in-app payment/settlement (out of initial scope; deferred to in-person cash/transfer)
Nationwide search (listings outside the living area are not shown)
Bulk-selling tools for businesses and pro sellers
assumptions: Listing and demand density within a living area is high enough to complete deals
risks: Low listing density in an early neighborhood means deals don't complete and users churn
In-person deals are hard for the app to fully protect against fraud and disputes
openQuestions: Fix the neighborhood radius or let users adjust it
Which behaviors should feed the manner score
constraints: Surface a safe-deal guide recommending public meetup spots

requirements.title: Onboarding & neighborhood verification
requirements.desc: After signup, verify the neighborhood and set up a profile

acceptance.text: Only users who complete location verification can see listings

features.title: Neighborhood verification
features.desc: Verify the current living area by GPS

acceptance.text: Listings are filtered by the verified neighborhood

specs.title: GPS-based neighborhood set
specs.desc: Auto-detect and confirm the neighborhood from the current location

specs.title: Adjust neighborhood range
specs.desc: Adjust the exposure radius between near and far

features.title: Profile
features.desc: Represent identity with a nickname and photo

specs.title: Nickname & photo
specs.desc: Register a display name and profile photo

acceptance.text: At least one photo and a price are required to post

features.title: Listing creation
features.desc: Post an item with photos, price, and category

specs.title: Price & condition
specs.desc: Enter the asking price and item condition (new/used)

specs.title: Category select
specs.desc: Assign a category such as furniture, digital, or clothing

features.title: Home feed
features.desc: Show the latest listings by neighborhood

specs.title: Neighborhood-based sorting
specs.desc: Sort listings by distance and recency

features.title: Search & filter
features.desc: Narrow listings by keyword and conditions

specs.title: Keyword search
specs.desc: Search titles and descriptions by keyword

specs.title: Price & category filter
specs.desc: Filter results by price range and category

requirements.title: Chat & dealing
requirements.desc: Arrange meetups over chat and manage deal status

acceptance.text: On completion, the status changes to 'sold'

features.title: Deal-status management
features.desc: Switch a listing between reserved and sold

specs.title: Assign buyer
specs.desc: Designate the actual buyer among chat partners

requirements.title: Trust & reputation
requirements.desc: Build trust with post-deal reviews and a manner score

features.title: Manner score & reviews
features.desc: Manage reputation with reviews and reports

specs.title: Post-deal review
specs.desc: Leave a manner rating for the deal partner
